L1.area: Project file import and parsing components

L2.description: An XML External Entity (XXE) vulnerability exists in project file parsing components. When processing XML-based project files, the XML parser does not disable external entity resolution or doctype declarations, allowing an attacker to supply a crafted project file that references external entities, potentially leading to information disclosure, server-side request forgery, or denial of service.

L3.area: Project file readers for Gantt chart and scheduling tool import formats
L3.description: An XML External Entity (XXE) vulnerability exists in project file readers that parse third-party Gantt chart and scheduling tool formats. When importing project files from these tools, the XML parser does not disable external entity resolution or doctype declarations, allowing an attacker to supply a crafted project file that references external entities, potentially leading to information disclosure, server-side request forgery, or denial of service.

ground_truth.reason: Multiple XML project file readers create SAXParserFactory and XMLReader instances without disabling doctype declarations or external entity processing, allowing XXE attacks via crafted project files.
